name: year splits retired player team stats
description: Retired player (Brady) year-splits 2018-2021 produces non-NULL team stats via player_year_teams CTE
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2018,2019,2020,2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" group by "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats.year = player_years.year group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
